Title: Co-founder & CEO
Description:
BluePilot
AI Co-Pilot for FWA Detection & Triage
Query complex claims, providers and patterns in plain English—no SQL, dashboards or noise. It's the fastest way to triage suspicious activity.



BlueFlag
AI Plan Compliance Engine
Cross-check uploaded regulations, SOPs, contracts, policies, training materials, claims and more to flag misalignments instantly. Feel confident with transparent citations and explainability.



BlueBrief
AI One-Click FWA Case Summaries
Generate case briefs from messy claims data, provider history, and notes in one click—so you can hand off clean narratives to compliance, audit and legal.



BlueCheck
Auto-Claims Data Validation
Automatically detect missing fields, mismatched values and suspicious anomalies in claims—so you (and others downstream) don’t waste time investigating bad inputs.
